meaning: n.小乘佛教(主要流传于斯里兰卡、缅甸、泰国和柬埔寨)
examples: In fact, many Hinayana and Mahayana, they don't think Vajrayana is Buddhism.
The Mahayana Buddhism and The Hinayana Buddhism came into China almost simultaneously.
The Chan sect of China has called itself"Supplementary Biography of Buddhism", but its MuniuYus not only come from Mahayana, but also have a bearing on Hinayana.
